hero.subtitle: Generated from your codebase. Synced with every commit. Deployed in seconds.
hero.subtitle_b: Import from GitBook or Mintlify in minutes. Keep your URLs, structure, and team — zero rebuild.
hero.subtitle_c: InkLoom generates docs from your codebase and keeps them in sync with every commit. Set up once, never fall behind again.
hero.subtitle_d: Block editor, OpenAPI auto-gen, GitHub sync, custom domains. Everything you need, nothing you don't.
hero.subtitle_e: A GitHub Action keeps your documentation in sync with every commit. No manual rewrites. No stale pages. Ever.
hero.subtitle_f: Point InkLoom at your codebase. It generates docs, keeps them current with every PR, and deploys to the edge — while your team ships features.
hero.subtitle_g: Per-project pricing. Free tier forever. No org-wide lock-in. Upgrade only the projects that need it.
hero.subtitle_h: Block editor, auto-generated OpenAPI reference, bidirectional GitHub sync, AI doc generation — everything in one place. Self-host or cloud.
hero.ctaNoCard: Start for free — no credit card

features.title: Everything you need to ship
features.subtitle: From writing to deployment, InkLoom handles the entire documentation lifecycle so your team can focus on building.

blockEditor.title: Write docs like you think
blockEditor.description: A block-based editor built for technical writing. Drag and drop content blocks, embed code snippets with syntax highlighting, add callouts, tabs, and interactive API playgrounds -- no Markdown required.

deploy.title: One-click to the edge
deploy.description: Deploy to Cloudflare Pages with a single click. Your docs are served from 300+ edge locations worldwide, with automatic SSL and instant cache invalidation.

openapi.title: OpenAPI in, beautiful docs out
openapi.description: Drop in your OpenAPI spec and get fully interactive API reference documentation. Automatically generates endpoint pages with request/response examples, parameters, and authentication details.

github.title: Two-way GitHub integration
github.description: Import docs from any GitHub repository. Changes sync bidirectionally -- edit in InkLoom or push to Git, everything stays in sync. Branch previews let you review doc changes alongside code PRs.

askAi.title: Ask AI about your docs
askAi.description: Your readers can ask questions and get instant answers grounded in your documentation. Powered by your content, not generic responses.
askAi.placeholder: How do I authenticate API requests?
askAi.answer: To authenticate API requests, include your API key in the Authorization header as a Bearer token. See the Authentication guide for details.

domains.title: Your brand, your domain
domains.descriptionStart: Serve docs from your own custom domain with automatic SSL. Configure subpaths like

collaboration.title: Write together, in real time
collaboration.description: See your teammates' cursors as they type. Leave inline comments, suggest edits, and resolve feedback -- all without leaving the editor. Powered by conflict-free replicated data types.

history.title: Every change, tracked
history.description: Full version history for every page. Compare revisions side by side, restore previous versions instantly, and see exactly who changed what and when.

search.title: Instant full-text search
search.description: Your users find answers in milliseconds. Client-side search index built at deploy time, with fuzzy matching, keyboard navigation, and section-level results. No external search service required.

automation.title: Documentation that writes
automation.subtitle: Point InkLoom at your codebase and watch it generate comprehensive product and developer documentation. A GitHub Action keeps everything evergreen -- docs update automatically with every PR and commit.
automation.step1Description: Commit to main or open a PR

terminal.title: Deploy from anywhere
terminal.subtitle: Use the CLI for automated deployments, CI/CD pipelines, or when you just prefer the terminal.

templates.title: Choose your starting point
templates.subtitle: Start from a proven structure and customize it to fit your project. Each template comes pre-organized so you can focus on writing.

deployChoice.title: Deploy your way
deployChoice.subtitle: Run on our cloud for zero-config deploys, or self-host on your own infrastructure. Same product, full control either way.

comparison.title: Why teams switch to InkLoom
comparison.subtitle: Teams move to InkLoom because documentation should accelerate your product, not slow it down.
comparison.migrationSubtitle: Import your entire docs site in one click — pages, navigation, components, and branding. Your URLs stay the same, so nothing breaks.

faq.title: Migration questions answered
faq.q1: How does the Mintlify import work?
faq.a1: During onboarding, select "Import from Mintlify" and provide your Mintlify project URL. InkLoom's CLI pulls your pages, navigation structure, and assets, then creates matching pages in your new InkLoom project. You can review and edit everything before publishing.
faq.a2: No. InkLoom preserves your existing URL slugs during import. When you point your domain to InkLoom, all existing links continue working. We also generate a redirect map for any structural changes.
faq.a3: InkLoom supports MDX, so most custom components work as-is. Our import tool maps common Mintlify components (callouts, tabs, accordions) to InkLoom equivalents. For anything custom, you can bring your own React components.
faq.a4: Eligible Mintlify migrations receive a 1-month migration credit applied to your first annual invoice. Complete your import during the trial period and select an annual plan to redeem it.
faq.a5: Absolutely. Every InkLoom project starts with a generous free tier. Import your docs, explore the editor, and only upgrade when you're ready. No credit card required to start.

usersBilled.question: How are users billed?
usersBilled.answer: Users are billed at a flat org-wide rate — $15/mo per seat (or $12/mo on annual). This rate applies across all projects in your organization, regardless of which plan each project uses.

differentPlans.question: Can different projects use different plans?
differentPlans.answer: Yes. Each project in your organization independently chooses Free, Pro, or Ultimate. There's no org-wide plan lock-in.

freeProjects.question: What happens with free projects?
freeProjects.answer: Free projects stay free forever — no time limit, no credit card required. You only pay when you upgrade a specific project to Pro or Ultimate.

userLimits.question: Are there user limits on paid plans?
userLimits.answer: No. Pro and Ultimate projects support unlimited users. You pay per seat at the org level, but there's no ceiling on how many seats you can add.

annualBilling.question: How does annual billing work?
annualBilling.answer: Annual billing saves 20% compared to monthly. You pay upfront for the year and receive the equivalent of two months free.

migrationCredit.question: What is the migration credit and who is eligible?
migrationCredit.answer: When you migrate from GitBook or Mintlify and choose an annual plan, you receive a 1-month credit applied to your first invoice. The migration must be completed successfully to qualify.

aiCredits.question: How do AI credits work? What about overages?
aiCredits.answer: Pro includes 20 AI credits per month and Ultimate includes 100. Credits reset monthly. If you exceed your allocation, additional usage is billed in dollars on your next invoice.

trialUsers.question: How many users during the trial?
trialUsers.answer: Trials include unlimited users for the full 14-day period. After the trial, you choose a plan and start paying per seat.

migrateBeforePaid.question: Can I migrate before choosing a paid plan?
migrateBeforePaid.answer: Yes. Our automated importer supports migrating from Mintlify and GitBook on any plan, including free. Import your docs, explore the platform, and upgrade whenever you're ready.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: How does the GitBook import work?
faq.a1: Our CLI-based importer connects to your GitBook workspace and pulls your content, page structure, and navigation. It converts GitBook-specific blocks to InkLoom's format automatically. The entire process typically takes a few minutes.
faq.q2: Will my URLs and redirects be preserved?
faq.a2: InkLoom preserves your page slugs during import. You can set up your custom domain and configure redirects in your project settings to ensure existing links continue working.
faq.q3: Can I keep some projects on GitBook while testing InkLoom?
faq.a3: Absolutely. Import one project first, test it out, and migrate the rest when you're ready. InkLoom doesn't require an all-or-nothing switch.
faq.a4: Eligible GitBook migrations receive a 1-month credit on their first paid project. The credit is applied automatically when you import from GitBook during signup.
faq.a5: Each project in your organization can be on a different tier — Free, Pro, or Ultimate. You only pay for the tier each project needs. Seats are shared across your organization, so you pay once per editor regardless of how many projects they access.

howItWorks.title: From code to docs in three steps
howItWorks.subtitle: Set it up once, then forget about it. Your documentation stays accurate forever.

step1.title: Write Code
step1.description: Develop your API, SDK, or library as you normally would. Add JSDoc comments, docstrings, or OpenAPI annotations for richer output.

step2.title: Push to GitHub
step2.description: The InkLoom Docs Action triggers automatically on every push or pull request. AI analyzes your changes and regenerates affected documentation.

step3.title: Docs Update Automatically
step3.description: Updated documentation deploys to the edge in seconds. API references, guides, and examples all reflect your latest code — no manual work required.

branchReview.description: Create branches to draft changes without affecting live docs. Review updates in isolation, iterate with your team, and merge when ready — just like code.

mergeRequests.title: Merge requests for governance
mergeRequests.description: Every change goes through a structured review process. Assign reviewers, leave comments, request changes, and maintain a complete audit trail of approvals.

realtimeCollab.title: Real-time collaboration
realtimeCollab.description: Edit pages simultaneously with your team using real-time cursors and live updates powered by PartyKit. No more conflicting edits or stale copies.

fullTextSearch.title: Full-text search
fullTextSearch.description: Find any page, heading, or paragraph instantly with full-text search across your entire knowledge base. Your team always finds answers fast.

internalPublishing.title: Internal-only publishing
internalPublishing.description: Keep sensitive docs private with internal-only publishing. Restrict access to your organization so runbooks, policies, and internal guides stay confidential.

roleAccess.title: Role-based access control
roleAccess.description: Assign roles like admin, editor, and viewer to control who can create, edit, or just read content. Fine-grained permissions keep your knowledge base secure.

hero.headline: Ship beautiful docs fast
hero.subhead: InkLoom is the open-source documentation platform built for fast-moving teams. Unlimited pages and projects on the free plan, per-project pricing that grows with you, and AI-powered generation on paid plans so your engineers can ship features instead of writing docs.
hero.note: Free plan includes unlimited pages and unlimited projects with 1 user per project. No credit card required.

benefits.title: Everything you need,
benefits.subtitle: Stop paying enterprise prices for documentation. InkLoom gives startups best-in-class docs tooling at a fraction of the cost — or completely free.
benefits.freeDesc: Unlimited pages and unlimited projects, each with 1 user included. Upgrade individual projects to Pro or Ultimate when you need more.
benefits.ossDesc: Your docs live in your GitHub repo as MDX. Fork it, self-host it, or use our cloud — your content is always yours.
benefits.pricingDesc: Mix Free, Pro, and Ultimate tiers across projects in one org. Only pay for what each project needs — one invoice, no surprises.
benefits.aiDesc: Generate docs from your codebase, API specs, or a quick prompt. Keep them evergreen with automatic updates as your product changes.

features.title: Tools your team
features.subtitle: InkLoom fits into the workflows startups already use — Git, GitHub, CLI, and CI/CD. No proprietary lock-in, no new tools to learn.
features.cliDesc: Create, push, and deploy docs from your terminal. Integrate documentation into your existing development workflow without context-switching.
features.githubDesc: Docs deploy automatically when you merge to main. Set up bidirectional sync so edits in the dashboard push back to your repo.
features.templatesTitle: Beautiful templates out of the box
features.templatesDesc: Choose from professionally designed templates — API references, guides, changelogs — and customize with your brand. Ship polished docs on day one.
features.edgeDesc: Every doc site deploys to Cloudflare's edge network. Your users get sub-50ms load times worldwide, with zero infrastructure to manage.

showcase.title: See what your
showcase.subtitle: A fully branded, professionally designed documentation site — deployed in minutes, not weeks.

terminal.title: From zero to docs in
terminal.subtitle: Scaffold, develop, and deploy — all from your terminal. No GUI required.

hero.headline: Help docs your users actually read
hero.subhead: Create beautiful, fast product documentation that feels like part of your brand. InkLoom gives you themed help docs with custom domains, global edge delivery, and built-in reader feedback — so your users find answers before they open a ticket.

features.title: Built for product teams who care about UX
features.subtitle: From gorgeous themes to global CDN deployment, InkLoom handles the infrastructure so you can focus on writing docs that help your users succeed.
features.themePresetsDesc: Choose from nine hand-crafted themes — Aurora, Verdant, Ember, Midnight, and more — or create a fully custom theme with your own colors, fonts, and effects. Your docs, your brand.
features.customDomainsDesc: Serve docs from your own domain with vanity subdomains (my-product.inkloom.dev) or full custom hostnames (docs.yourcompany.com) via CNAME. SSL certificates are provisioned automatically.
features.edgeDeployedDesc: Every publish deploys your docs to Cloudflare Pages across 300+ locations worldwide. Readers get sub-100ms load times no matter where they are.
features.changelogDesc: Ship release notes alongside your docs. Your changelog lives at the same domain, styled with the same theme — so users always know what changed and when.
features.starterTemplatesDesc: Don't start from scratch. Pick a starter template for API references, getting-started guides, or knowledge bases, then customize it to fit your product.
features.feedbackWidgetDesc: Every page includes a feedback widget with three reaction options — helpful, neutral, or not helpful — so readers can tell you what works. Track page-level satisfaction without third-party tools.

themes.title: Pick a theme. Make it yours.
themes.subtitle: Every theme ships with light and dark modes, custom typography, and tuned color palettes. Switch themes in one click or build your own from scratch.
themes.customNote: Plus Ink, Dune, Fossil, Vapor, Aubergine, and fully custom themes with your own colors, fonts, and effects.

deploy.title: From editor to live in seconds
deploy.description: Hit publish and your docs are live on a global CDN instantly. No build pipelines to configure, no CI to maintain. InkLoom deploys to Cloudflare Pages so your help docs are always fast, always available, and always up to date.

cta.title: Launch your docs today
cta.subtitle: Start free and upgrade when you're ready. No credit card required, no time limit on the free plan.

hero.headline: Documentation infrastructure for teams
hero.subhead: Give every team a single source of truth. InkLoom Enterprise brings SSO, role-based access, custom domains, and dedicated support to organizations that ship docs as a core part of their product.

features.title: Everything your team needs to ship docs with confidence
features.subtitle: Purpose-built for organizations that treat documentation as critical infrastructure — not an afterthought.
features.ssoDesc: Authenticate your team through your existing identity provider via WorkOS. Configure SAML-based SSO with providers like Okta, Azure AD, and Google Workspace — so your team logs in with the credentials they already use.
features.rbacDesc: Fine-grained permissions with four roles — Owner, Admin, Member, and Viewer — let you control who can edit, publish, and manage settings across your organization.
features.customDomainsDesc: Publish documentation to your own domain — docs.yourcompany.com — with automatic SSL and global CDN delivery via Cloudflare.
features.auditLogsDesc: Track edits, publishes, and membership changes across your organization. Version history lets you see what changed and when, so your team stays accountable.
features.dedicatedSupportDesc: Get priority access to our engineering team with a dedicated account manager, private Slack channel, and guaranteed response times.
features.slaDesc: Enterprise plans include custom uptime SLAs tailored to your organization's requirements, so your published documentation is always available when your users need it.
features.apiAccessDesc: Programmatic access to manage projects, pages, and deployments. Integrate InkLoom into your CI/CD pipeline and automate documentation workflows.

security.title: Built for teams that take security seriously
security.subtitle: Your documentation often contains sensitive product details. We treat security as a first-class requirement, not a checkbox.
security.soc2Desc: Our infrastructure and processes are designed around SOC 2 controls. We maintain rigorous access management, encryption at rest and in transit, and continuous monitoring.
security.privacyDesc: Your content is yours. We enforce strict data isolation between organizations, support data export at any time, and never use customer content for model training.
security.selfHostDesc: Need full control? Deploy InkLoom on your own infrastructure. Our self-hosted option gives you complete ownership of your data and deployment environment.

scale.title: One platform, every team, every project
scale.subtitle: Most documentation platforms force you into one project per account. InkLoom was designed from the ground up for multi-project organizations.
scale.multiOrgDesc: Manage dozens of documentation projects under a single organization. Each project gets its own settings, domain, and access controls — all from one dashboard.
scale.perProjectTieringDesc: Not every project needs the same plan. Mix Free, Pro, and Ultimate tiers across projects so you only pay for the features each team actually uses.
scale.unlimitedEditorsDesc: No arbitrary user caps. Pro and Ultimate plans support unlimited editors, so your entire team can contribute without hitting a paywall.
scale.singleInvoiceDesc: One organization, one bill. No more juggling separate accounts and invoices for every documentation project your company runs.
scale.editorsDesc: No cap on editors — add unlimited seats on Pro and Ultimate
scale.edgeDesc: Global CDN with sub-100ms response times

offer.customDomainsDesc: Publish docs on your own domain with your project's branding. Make the documentation truly yours.
offer.analyticsDesc: Add your own analytics tracking to your published docs — Google Analytics 4, PostHog, or any custom script.
offer.aiDocsDesc: Generate documentation from your codebase with AI. Keep docs in sync as your project evolves.

offer.valueCallout: That's ${price}/month per project in value — free for qualifying open-source projects.

value.title: per project, per month
value.subtitle: Every accepted project receives the complete Pro plan — the same tools used by teams at leading companies. Yours free, forever.

eligibility.title: Three simple requirements
eligibility.subtitle: Our program supports independent, community-driven projects that strengthen the open-source ecosystem.
eligibility.step1Desc: Released under an OSI-approved license — MIT, Apache 2.0, GPL, BSD, or similar.
eligibility.step2Desc: Not venture-backed or owned by a for-profit company with dedicated funding.
eligibility.step3Desc: Actively maintained with genuine community engagement and contributors.
eligibility.note: Not sure if you qualify? Apply anyway — we review every application individually and err on the side of inclusion.

why.title: Documentation is infrastructure
why.quote: We built InkLoom because documentation should be as easy to write and deploy as the code it describes. We started this program because every open-source project deserves professional-grade documentation tools — regardless of budget. If your project helps developers build better software, we want to help you explain it to the world. That's not charity — it's investing in the ecosystem we all depend on.

cta.title: Ready to elevate your docs?
cta.subtitle: Tell us about your project and we'll review your application. Most applications are processed within two business days.
cta.note: Have questions? Reach out at oss@inkloom.io

hero.headline: Switch to InkLoom in minutes
hero.subhead: Moving your docs shouldn't be a project. Whether you're on Mintlify, GitBook, or plain Markdown -- InkLoom's CLI imports your content in a single command. No lock-in, no data loss, no downtime.

sources.title: Where are your docs today?
sources.subtitle: InkLoom supports direct imports from Mintlify and GitBook, plus any standard Markdown or MDX source.

mintlify.name: From Mintlify
mintlify.description: One-command migration with inkloom import --from mintlify. Your pages, navigation, and metadata come along for the ride.

gitbook.name: From GitBook
gitbook.description: Pull your entire GitBook workspace into InkLoom with inkloom import --from gitbook. Keeps your structure intact.

markdown.name: From Markdown / MDX
markdown.description: Already have .md or .mdx files? Push them directly with the CLI or set up a GitHub Action for continuous sync.

steps.title: Migrate in three simple steps
steps.subtitle: No complex setup, no vendor calls, no migration consultants. Just run the CLI and you're live.
steps.connectDesc: Install the InkLoom CLI and authenticate with your account. Point it at your existing docs source.
steps.reviewDesc: Preview your imported pages in the InkLoom editor. Adjust navigation, tweak formatting, add your brand.
steps.publishDesc: Deploy to Cloudflare's edge network with one click. Your new docs site is live in seconds.

comparison.title: See the transformation
comparison.subtitle: Your documentation, elevated. Compare a typical docs page before and after switching to InkLoom.

benefits.title: Why teams switch to InkLoom
benefits.subtitle: Built for teams that care about developer experience, cost transparency, and owning their content.

openSource.title: No vendor lock-in
openSource.description: InkLoom is open source. Your content stays in standard MDX files you can take anywhere. Fork it, self-host it, or use our managed cloud -- the choice is always yours.

perProject.description: Pay for the docs projects you ship. Pricing scales with your projects, and seats are affordable so your whole team can collaborate without breaking the budget.

aiPowered.description: Generate documentation from your codebase with a single CLI command or GitHub Action. InkLoom's AI engine explores your code, plans a doc structure, and writes accurate pages with real examples.
